description_long: This is a small, weathered hardware store structure with a rectangular footprint and a flat, concrete roof. The front features a faded green metal rolling shutter, above which sits a prominent red and white signboard with Tamil script and the word 'STORE' in English, as well as a phone number. A yellow vertical sign with additional Tamil text is attached to the right side of the entrance. The exterior walls are constructed from aged, whitewashed brickwork, showing signs of wear and discoloration. A metal ladder is affixed to one side, leading up to the roof, and the overall appearance suggests utilitarian construction with minimal decorative elements. The store is compact, with no visible windows or display areas, and the entrance is secured by the rolling shutter.
description: A compact, weathered hardware store with a faded green rolling shutter, red and white Tamil-English signage, and aged brick walls. The storefront is utilitarian, featuring a metal ladder and minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the weathered brick wall and a metal ladder leading to the roof.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the green rolling shutter, red and white bilingual signboard, and a yellow vertical sign.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with plain brick wall and the edge of the roof sign visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, weathered brick wall and the back of the rooftop sign.
attribute_storefront_signage: A large red and white signboard above the entrance with Tamil script, the word 'STORE' in English, and a phone number; a smaller yellow vertical sign with Tamil text on the right side of the entrance.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront has a central green rolling shutter as the entrance, flanked by a yellow vertical sign on the right. There are no visible windows or display areas, and a large signboard is mounted above the entrance.
